home.title: Control what the world sees first.
home.description: We turn online reputation into a measurable asset through monitoring, search visibility, PR, and discreet strategy.
home.signalTitle: Search, media, and social presence are part of your credibility.
home.discretionText: Every plan is structured around privacy, control, and clarity so the work stays visible only where it matters.
home.approachTitle: A calm system for high-stakes visibility.
home.approachDescription: We work in three deliberate stages so each action improves trust and reduces noise.
home.servicesTitle: Six service directions, grouped into pillars.
home.servicesDescription: Every service is designed around real reputation risk, visibility, and trust.
home.ctaTitle: Your reputation should feel controlled, not chaotic.
home.surfaceHeading: From noisy search results to a controlled top 10.
home.surfaceSubheading: Scroll to see how a managed program reduces the signals that create doubt and raises the ones that build trust.
home.stakesTitle: What the world sees when it searches your name.
home.stakesDescription: Most reputation risk is quiet until the wrong moment — a due-diligence check, a first meeting, a press mention.
home.trustTitle: Built for clients who need discretion, not attention.
home.trustDescription: Every engagement is structured so sensitive work stays private, and only the outcome is visible.
home.faqTitle: Common questions before you reach out.

services.title: A structured view of reputation work
services.description: The core service pillars are grouped around search visibility, trust signals, content, social presence and digital surfaces.
services.whyText: PR-MIND combines reputation analysis, content strategy, and technical execution so every action is visible to your audience and controlled for your business.

approach.title: Three stages for controlled reputation work
approach.description: We move from diagnosis to strategy to ongoing management so each action is clear, measurable, and discreet.

cases.title: Confidential outcomes, structured around trust
cases.description: Real client narratives remain private, so the case studies here describe the type of work, not the people behind it.

contacts.title: Choose the channel that fits your situation
contacts.description: Every lead path is designed for privacy, clarity, and speed. Use the form, a messenger, or a direct call.

insights.title: Articles that help people understand reputation work
insights.description: The insights section is built as an SEO and AEO foundation for the brand, not just a blog archive.
insights.whyText: Reputation affects not only trust, but also conversion, negotiations, partner acquisition, and long-term brand growth.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Draft policy — requires client legal review before publication. // TODO: legal review
privacy.dataText: Name, preferred contact channel, and contact details you provide through the lead form. // TODO: extend once analytics is enabled
privacy.useText: Solely to respond to your request and route it to the right contact channel. Data is not shared with third parties without consent.
privacy.rightsText: You may request deletion or a copy of your data by writing to hello@prmind.example.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Draft terms — requires client legal review before publication. // TODO: legal review
terms.useText: Content on this site is provided for informational purposes about PR-MIND services and is not legal or financial advice.
terms.requestsText: Submitting the lead form does not create a contractual obligation — engagement terms are agreed separately.

pillarDetail.nextStepText: Tell us about your situation and we will reply with a concrete plan and the right contact channel.

orm.howWeRun: How we run the ORM program
orm.whoForText: ORM fits founders, executives, and public figures who need a long-term, managed program rather than a one-off campaign.

leadForm.heading: Request a confidential audit
leadForm.subheading: We will respond with a clear next step and the right channel for your context.

leadForm.errorMessage: We could not send the request right now. Please try again shortly.
